title: State Nullifies Local Housing Rule Without Specific Compelling Statewide Interest
description: A state nullifies a city housing ordinance expanding multifamily housing near transit but relies only on generalized claims of statewide uniformity. The scenario tests whether Article X's local self-government provisions give courts a real basis to block unsupported state preemption of local ordinances on matters of local concern.

details.ordinance: a city ordinance allowing multifamily housing near transit corridors
